0.text: Interlobular septal thickenings in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Ground-glass opacities in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Nodule measuring 6.6 mm in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Nodule measuring 5 mm in the right middle lobe

4.text: Nodule measuring 4.5 mm in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

5.text: Nodule measuring 4 mm in the lingular segment
